title: Initialize Annotated Mockito Objects
description:
Objects annotated with Mockito annotations @Mock, @Spy, @Captor, or @InjectMocks need to be initialized explicitly.
Test using uninitialized mocks will fail.
Note that this only applies to annotated Mockito objects. It is not necessary to initialize objects instantiated via Mockito.mock() or Mockito.spy().
This rule raises an issue when a test class uses uninitialized mocks.
impact: Test failures due to uninitialized mocks

checks.message: Annotated Mockito objects must be initialized.
Mockito objects annotated with @Mock, @Spy, @Captor, or @InjectMocks should not be left uninitialized.
Initialization of Mockito objects should not use Mockito.mock() or Mockito.spy() for annotated fields.
Mockito annotations are only relevant in the context of a test class.
